allow: PowerShell(cd E:\\Project\\po-test-bench; $env:GEMINI_API_KEY = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match '^GEMINI_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^GEMINI_API_KEY=', '' }\); Write-Host "Key found: $\($env:GEMINI_API_KEY.Length\) chars")

PowerShell(cd E:\\Project\\po-test-bench; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npm run dev 2>&1" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "Server PID: $\($proc.Id\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $sid = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/session/start" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json"\).sessionId; Write-Host "Session: $sid"; $doc = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/session/$sid/document" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"docType":"user-story"}'; Write-Host "Doc \(first 200 chars\):`n$\($doc.content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $doc.content.Length\)\)\)")

PowerShell(cd E:\\Project\\po-test-bench; $key = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match '^GEMINI_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^GEMINI_API_KEY=', '' }\); $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=$key" -Method GET; $resp.models | Where-Object { $_.supportedGenerationMethods -contains "generateContent" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty name | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(cd E:\\Project\\po-test-bench; $key = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match '^GEMINI_API_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^GEMINI_API_KEY=', '' }\); $body = '{"contents":[{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"Say hi"}]}]}'; foreach \($m in @\("gemini-2.0-flash-lite","gemini-2.5-flash-lite","gemini-2.5-flash"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/$\($m\):generateContent?key=$key" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Host "OK: $m -> $\($r.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $m -> $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(100,$_.Exception.Message.Length\)\)\)" } })
